name: WIP Aging
query:
SELECT
    v_facts.entity_id AS issue_key,
    v_facts.value AS age_days,
    stat.name AS current_status,
    itype.name AS issue_type,
    v_facts.context_json->>'assignee' AS assignee
FROM metrics.v_facts
LEFT JOIN clean_jira.issues i ON v_facts.entity_id = i.external_key
LEFT JOIN clean_jira.issue_statuses stat ON i.status_id = stat.id
LEFT JOIN clean_jira.issue_types itype ON i.type_id = itype.id
WHERE v_facts.calc_code = 'aging_days'
  [[AND {{project_key}}]]
  [[AND {{date_range}}]]
  [[ AND itype.name = {{issue_type}} ]]
ORDER BY v_facts.value DESC
